common.comingSoonText: This area is still a scaffold placeholder. The design is in place; data and actions land in upcoming milestones.

home.heroSubtitle: Games, romhacks, translations, documentation and tools: catalogued, versioned and linked to their source game. A modern romhacking.net, dark and sharp.
home.trendingEmpty: The weekly ranking shows up here once downloads are recorded.

browse.emptyText: Connect Supabase and add content, or adjust the filters.

games.title: Games
games.subtitle: The central entity: everything hangs off its source game.
games.emptyText: No games registered. With Supabase configured, games show up here.
games.adultHint: Adult content: hover to reveal the cover
games.ostRemoveConfirm: Remove this album and its tracks?
games.ostSearchHint: Pick the right album from the list. The search is human-assisted on purpose: matching by title alone gets it wrong ("Celeste" matches "Mélodie céleste").
games.ostNoResults: Nothing found on MusicBrainz for that term.
games.logPlayHint: Logs a session for today (retro, emulator, physical) in your history
games.logPlayDone: Today's session logged to your history.
games.ostNoTracks: This edition has no tracks listed on MusicBrainz.
games.ostEditionHint: The same album has per-country editions (the Japanese one comes with Japanese track titles). Pick the one you want; tracks are rewritten.

entities.originHint: Imported from this source: open the original page
entities.noFileNote: The source does not host this item's file.
entities.romhacksSubtitle: ROM modifications: new levels, difficulty, fixes and reimaginings.
entities.translationsSubtitle: Fan localizations, with source and target language.
entities.docsSubtitle: Guides, RAM maps, file formats and reverse engineering.
entities.toolsSubtitle: Editors, patchers, compressors and romhacking utilities.
entities.detailPlaceholder: This item's detail page lands in an upcoming milestone: with tabs, files, screenshots, reviews and downloads.
entities.notFoundText: This item doesn't exist or was removed.
entities.noneForGame: Nothing linked to this game yet.
entities.patchUsageHint: Completions logged by the community using this translation/hack

search.startText: Type at least 2 characters to search games, romhacks, translations, docs and tools.

forms.submitSubtitle: Example form (react-hook-form + zod). Submitting does not persist anything yet.
forms.submitSubtitleReal: Pick a type, link a source game and upload the file. It's saved under your account.
forms.mustLogin: You're browsing as a guest, sign in to save your submission.
forms.phDescription: What does this romhack change? Levels, difficulty, story…
forms.valDescMin: Describe it in at least 20 characters.
forms.authNote: This is just an example of the form pattern. No data is sent to a server.

auth.loginSubtitle: No password. We email you an access link.
auth.sentText: We sent an access link to {{email}}. Open it on this device to sign in.
auth.notConfigured: Sign-in unavailable: Supabase is not configured yet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Preferences for your session on this device.
settings.sectionLanguageHint: Switches the language of the whole interface.
settings.sectionAppearanceHint: The dark terminal theme is the only one for now.
settings.sectionPrivacyHint: Who can see your library, showcase and completions
settings.accountsHint: Link your accounts to sync games, hours and achievements automatically
settings.accountsCooldown: Synced recently, again in ~{{min}} min (automatic sync runs on its own)
settings.syncMisses_one: {{count}} game with no catalog match (click to see)
settings.syncMisses_other: {{count}} games with no catalog match (click to see)
settings.syncMissesHint: These titles exist in your account but matched no game of ours on the right platform. Importing that platform into the catalog (admin) or linking manually fixes it.
settings.syncHealthHint: Per account: how many games matched our catalog (IGDB)
settings.syncHealthFoot: Unlinked ones still show in the library, just without a rich page. The daily sync and auto-relink match them over time.
settings.steamVerifying: Steam login confirmed, syncing your library…
settings.help_steam_1: The easy way: click "Sign in via Steam", you log in on Steam and we detect your SteamID automatically.
settings.help_steam_2: Manual: your SteamID64 is shown at store.steampowered.com/account (17 digits, starts with 7656), or use your vanity URL (the name in steamcommunity.com/id/YOURNAME).
settings.help_steam_3: Your profile and "game details" must be PUBLIC in Steam's privacy settings.
settings.help_ra_1: Enter your RetroAchievements username (same as the site).
settings.help_ra_2: 100% games become Finished; partial progress becomes Playing, with X/Y achievements.
settings.help_psn_2: Trophies must be visible to "Anyone" in your PlayStation account privacy.
settings.help_xbox_1: Enter your gamertag (without the #1234 suffix, if any).
settings.help_xbox_2: Your profile must allow others to see your game history (default for most accounts).
settings.help_gog_1: Enter your GOG username (from the URL gog.com/u/YOURNAME).
settings.help_gog_2: Your profile must be PUBLIC in GOG's privacy settings.
settings.help_epic_1: Log in to Epic in your browser (epicgames.com).
settings.help_epic_2: Open the link below: it returns a JSON with an authorizationCode field.
settings.help_epic_3: Paste that code here (or the whole JSON). It is single-use and lasts a few minutes.
settings.help_nintendo_1: Enter your friend code (SW-1234-5678-9012, on Switch: your profile → Profile).
settings.help_nintendo_2: The ROMVault account will send you a friend request: accept it on your Switch (or the NSO app).
settings.help_nintendo_3: After accepting, click Sync again. Games flow in as you play (Nintendo only exposes the current/last game, same limitation as PlayTracker).
settings.raHint: Retro achievements: 100% games become Finished; progress becomes Playing (public RA profile)
settings.raDone: RA: {{matched}} of {{total}} games matched the catalog, {{tracks}} added to your library!
settings.psnHint: PSN trophies: platinum/100% becomes Finished; progress becomes Playing (public profile)
settings.psnDone: PSN: {{matched}} of {{total}} games matched the catalog, {{tracks}} added to your library!
settings.xboxHint: Xbox achievements via xbl.io: 100% becomes Finished; progress becomes Playing
settings.xboxDone: Xbox: {{matched}} of {{total}} games matched the catalog, {{tracks}} added to your library!
settings.gogHint: GOG library via public profile: games + hours (set your GOG profile to public)
settings.gogDone: GOG: {{matched}} of {{total}} games matched the catalog, {{tracks}} added to your library!
settings.epicHint: Epic library: games + hours. We store the access encrypted to sync daily on its own; unlinking deletes it.
settings.epicDone: Epic: {{matched}} of {{total}} games matched the catalog, {{tracks}} added to your library!
settings.nintendoHint: EXPERIMENTAL (NSO app API): enter your friend code, accept ROMVault's friend request on your Switch, and games accumulate as you play (daily sync)
settings.fnNotDeployed: Function {{fn}} not deployed yet (supabase functions deploy {{fn}} --no-verify-jwt).
settings.inviteHint: Got an invite code? Redeem it here: your profile shows who brought you
settings.inviteRedeemed: Invite redeemed! You were invited by @{{user}}.
settings.apiHint: Keys to read the catalog from the public API. We store only a hash, copy it now, it won't be shown again.
settings.apiRevokeConfirm: Revoke this key? Apps using it will stop working.
settings.steamHint: Brings your Steam library (games + hours) into your tracks. Never overwrites manual statuses.
settings.steamDone: Steam: {{games}} games read, {{tracks}} added to your library ({{created}} new catalog games).
settings.steamNote: Requires the steam-import Edge Function deployed (supabase functions deploy steam-import --no-verify-jwt) and the STEAM_API_KEY secret.
settings.steamNotDeployed: Couldn't reach the function. Deploy: supabase functions deploy steam-import --no-verify-jwt

library.title: {{user}}'s library
library.emptyText: Add games from their pages: "Add to library".
library.runDateRequired: A date is required (day, month or at least the year).
library.runDateSuggested: Date suggested from your activity: adjust as needed.
library.dupWarning: You already own this game on: {{platforms}}
library.goalHint: how many games you want to finish this year
library.dupesHint: Games with more than one copy
library.runReviewPh: Mini-review for this completion (optional, with stars it becomes your game review)
library.syncHint: The same game can exist on several platforms, each linked account keeps its own data; your manual status is never overwritten.
library.syncSummaryHint: Account aggregate: synced games · hours · achievements
library.exportHint: Downloads your library (games, statuses, hours, copies) as JSON
library.importText: Paste a CSV (or attach a Backloggd/HLTB/spreadsheet export) with title, platform, status and hours columns, headers are auto-detected. Nothing existing is overwritten.
library.importNone: No rows with a title found in what you pasted.
library.importDone: {{added}} games added (out of {{total}} rows; {{missed}} unmatched, list downloaded for you).
library.privateBadge: Private game: only you can see it
library.privacyOn: Game marked private: only you see it in your library and showcase.
library.privacyOff: Game is public again in your library.
library.privacyHintOn: This game is private (only you see it). Click to make it public.
library.privacyHintOff: Hide this game from your public library and showcase
library.privateChipHint: Show/hide the games you marked as private
library.groupHint: Linked versions (remaster, remake, port) collapse into one card: the last played represents the group
library.selectHint: Select multiple games for bulk actions
library.bulkRemoveHint: Takes the selected off the shelf and deletes their copies (playthroughs and reviews stay)
library.bulkRemoveConfirm_one: Remove {{count}} game from the library (and its copies)?
library.bulkRemoveConfirm_other: Remove {{count}} games from the library (and their copies)?

ustats.title: {{user}}'s stats
ustats.emptyText: Completions, syncs and new copies show up here. Link accounts in settings and the dashboard fills itself.

gate.title: You just need an invite
gate.text: ROMVault is in invite-only beta. Redeem your code to get in; if you don't have one, ask whoever showed you the site.

changelog.title: What's new
changelog.subtitle: What changed in ROMVault, batch by batch.

report.title: Report a problem
report.text: What's wrong with "{{title}}"? It goes straight to the curation queue.
report.sent: Report sent, thanks for helping curation!

onboard.title: Start with a full library
onboard.text: Link your accounts and your games, hours and achievements flow in by themselves: Steam, RetroAchievements, PlayStation, Xbox and GOG. Or add them by hand, your way.

about.title: About
about.intro: ROMVault was born to be the romhacking hub: the scene's archive (fan translations, hacks, docs, tools) linked game by game, with YOUR shelf inside it. We don't just track what you played: we track WHICH translation or hack you played it with.
about.p1x: Every translation, hack, document and tool points to its source game. No loose lists.
about.p2x: Completions and copies record the patch used. Each translation's page shows how many people finished with it. Credit to the makers.
about.p3x: Status, hours, achievements, physical and digital copies, a showcase with the boxes: tracker and collector in one place.
about.p4x: Steam, RetroAchievements, PlayStation, Xbox, GOG and Nintendo: link your accounts and the library fills itself.
about.sourcesText: The catalog aggregates public data and decades of scene work. Every item points to its original source. The credit belongs to the makers:
about.rulesText: No ROMs, no ISOs: ROMVault catalogs PATCHES and knowledge. Downloads lead to the author's file or a public preservation mirror. Submitted content is moderated.

notif.title: Notifications
notif.empty: Nothing here yet, when a game in your backlog gets a translation, you'll know.
notif.backlogTranslation: {{game}} from your backlog just got a translation ({{lang}})!
notif.reportResolved: Your report on "{{title}}" was resolved. Thanks for helping!

platforms.title: Platforms
platforms.subtitle: The collection by system: from the 8-bit era to today, each platform with its own page.
platforms.emptyText: Run the migrations (platforms table) for this page to come alive.
platforms.aliasesHint: How each import source names this platform. Everyone sees the list; only admins edit.
platforms.aliasKeyPh: id or exact name at the source

upcoming.title: Upcoming releases
upcoming.subtitle: The schedule of what's still to come, what people are waiting for most, and what was announced without a date.
upcoming.emptyText: Run the upcoming-releases import to fill this page.

series.emptyText: Games get their series/franchise from the IGDB sync (or the backfill).

scene.title: Scene
scene.subtitle: The translations and hacks the community finishes the most, social proof for makers, discovery for players.
scene.emptyText: Once the community logs completions with the translation/hack used, the ranking is born here.

vitrine.title: {{user}}'s showcase
vitrine.subtitle_zero: No games in the collection yet.
vitrine.emptyText: The showcase displays the games you OWN (physical or digital copies). Add copies from each game's page.
vitrine.syncArtHint: Fills the covers missing on your games (via IGDB). Wait ~10 min between uses.

users.title: Community
users.subtitle: Discover other collectors and romhackers to follow.

wrapped.title: {{user}}'s year in games
wrapped.emptyText: Nothing logged in {{year}}, go finish something!

collections.title: Collections
collections.subtitle: Hand-picked selections: the best hacks, translations and tools by theme.
collections.emptyText: Curated collections will show up here.

apidocs.title: ROMVault API
apidocs.intro: Read the catalog programmatically. Public, read-only, key-authenticated.
apidocs.authText: Send your API key in the x-api-key header on every request.
apidocs.authManage: Create and manage keys in Settings.
apidocs.noteRead: Read-only for now (GET). Writes go through the app or the importer.
apidocs.noteDeploy: Requires the public-api Edge Function deployed (see supabase/functions/README.md).

errors.notFoundText: That route does not exist. Let's take you back.
errors.appText: An unexpected error happened. Reloading usually fixes it.
errors.notConfiguredText: VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY are not set. The app still runs, only data-backed areas stay empty.
errors.notConfiguredLocal: Local: copy .env.example to apps/web/.env, fill it in and restart the server.
errors.notConfiguredProd: Production (Vercel): set them in Settings → Environment Variables and redeploy.

profile.empty: This user hasn't published anything yet.
profile.syncedHint: Library fed by sync from these accounts
profile.sceneCount_one: {{count}} completion using a fan translation or hack, credit to the scene.
profile.sceneCount_other: {{count}} completions using fan translations or hacks, credit to the scene.

admin.title: Admin panel
admin.subtitle: Moderate content. Only admins can delete.
admin.forbiddenText: Your account doesn't have admin rights.
admin.syncHint: Pull games from IGDB straight into the catalog (incremental cursor per platform).
admin.syncDone: Sync done: {{imported}} imported, {{enriched}} covers filled, {{skipped}} skipped.
admin.syncNote: Requires: supabase functions deploy igdb-sync --no-verify-jwt (and TWITCH secrets set).
admin.itemSyncHint: cover/thumb always; screenshots, description, dev, genres and release only when empty
admin.itemQueryPh: Fix search term (e.g. Final Fantasy VI)…
admin.queueHint: The merge/link tool's worklist: sync games without IGDB, duplicate titles without relations, unknown aliases and recent sync misses
admin.integHint: Linked accounts and last sync per provider, if a cron stops, it shows up here first
admin.reportsHint: Wrong art/data/match flagged by users, resolving = fix the page and check it off
admin.jobsHint: Latest runs: CLI imports (covers, moby, igdb), sync crons and digest
admin.autoLinkNone: No unambiguous cases: the rest needs human eyes.
admin.bulkSyncNone: Nothing in the queue without IGDB to sync.
admin.mergeIdenticalNone: No safe duplicates to merge right now.
admin.cronsHint: Live database crons (cron.job) with each one's latest result
admin.cronMuteHint: Active but nothing recorded in 48h: check CRON_SECRET and that the function is deployed
admin.familiesHint: The biggest linked-version families: spot-check that the links came in clean
admin.cronWaitingHint: Scheduled, but the first execution time has not arrived yet
admin.syncFullPlatHint: Repeats batches of 500 until the selected platform is exhausted
admin.syncFullAllHint: Walks ALL platforms until exhausted: can take hours and grow the database a lot
admin.hltbHint: Fetch completion times from HowLongToBeat (fallback: IGDB)
admin.metacriticHint: Fetch the critic score from Metacritic (complementary)
admin.editText: Direct field editing (admin). Saves to the DB immediately; the slug/URL stays.
admin.editOverwriteHint: Pulls name, art and description from this IGDB id and overwrites.
admin.mergeLegendMerge: the two are the SAME game (a duplicate): move everything and delete this one
admin.mergeLegendLink: they are DIFFERENT games that relate (original/remaster/port)
admin.igdbMediaHint: Fetch localized covers, artworks and videos from IGDB (grouped like there)
admin.mergeHint: Merge this game with another catalog record (case: sync-created page duplicating the IGDB game)
admin.mergeTitle: Merge or link with another game
admin.mergeText: Search the catalog for the right record. MERGE moves everything from this game there and deletes this one; LINK just registers both as versions of the same game.
admin.mergeConfirm: Merge THIS game into "{{target}}"? Tracks, copies, hacks and translations move there and this page ceases to exist.
admin.mergeForceConfirm: "{{target}}" has a different igdb_id. If one of them has the wrong IGDB, you can merge anyway. Force merge?
admin.invitesHint: Generate codes and track uses; redeemers show "invited by you" on their profile
admin.addHint: Searches IGDB directly and imports ONE game into the catalog (e.g. the missing SNES Chrono Trigger)
admin.syncNotDeployed: Couldn't reach the function. Deploy it: supabase functions deploy igdb-sync --no-verify-jwt
admin.linkText: Search by name or paste the IGDB id, check the candidate details and link: cover, platforms and metadata come from the chosen record.
admin.linkNone: IGDB returned no candidates: adjust the term.

community.loginToReview: Sign in to leave a review →
community.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.subtitle: The vault's size: games, hacks and translations catalogued so far.
